typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		mve_gkey as integer,
		Unit_Nbr as string,
		Facility_Id as string,
		Complex_Id as string,
		Yard_Id as string,
		Carrier_Visit_Key as integer,
		Event_Type_Id as string,
		Move_Kind as string,
		From_Location as string,
		To_Location as string,
		From_Position_Name as string,
		To_Position_Name as string,
		Carry_CHE_Operator_Id as string,
		Fetch_CHE_Operator_Id as string,
		Put_CHE_Operator_Id as string,
		Fetch_CHE_Id as long,
		Fetch_CHE_Kind as string,
		Carry_CHE_Id as long,
		Carry_CHE_Kind as string,
		Put_CHE_Id as long,
		Put_CHE_Kind as string,
		QC_CHE_Id as long,
		QC_CHE_Kind as string,
		t_carry_complete as timestamp,
		t_put as timestamp,
		t_fetch as timestamp,
		t_dispatch as timestamp,
		t_discharge as timestamp,
		t_carry_dispatch as timestamp,
		t_carry_fetch_ready as timestamp,
		t_carry_put_ready as timestamp,
		dist_carry as short,
		dist_start as short,
		Twin_Fetch as boolean,
		Twin_Carry as boolean,
		Twin_Put as boolean,
		Category_Id as string,
		Freight_Kind_Id as string,
		to_pos_gkey as integer,
		fm_pos_gkey as integer,
		Restow_Reason as string,
		Container_Line_Id as string,
		Container_Line_Role as string,
		pow as string,
		ufv_gkey as integer,
		Berth_Id as string,
		Goods_And_Ctr_Wt_Kg as integer,
		active_ufv as integer,
		Requires_Power_Flag as boolean,
		OOG_Flag as boolean,
		Shipper_Id as string,
		Consignee_Id as string,
		Commodity_Id as string,
		ATD as timestamp,
		Rehandles as short,
		ATA as timestamp,
		Year as integer,
		Month as integer,
		Week as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	format: 'delta',
	fileSystem: 'mct',
	folderPath: 'silver/moves') ~> moves
source(output(
		Carrier_Visit_Key as integer,
		Carrier_Visit_Id as string,
		Vessel_Id as string,
		Complex_Id as string,
		Facility_Id as string,
		Phase as string,
		Visit_Nbr as boolean,
		Carrier_Mode as string,
		ATA as string,
		ATD as string,
		ETA as string,
		ETD as string,
		Operator_Line_Id as string,
		Operator_Line_Role as string,
		Operator_Line_Name as string,
		Time_First_Availabilty as string,
		Time_Discharge_Complete as string,
		Service_Id as string,
		Service_Name as string,
		IB_VYG as string,
		OB_VYG as string,
		Carrier_Name as string,
		Vessel_Class as string,
		Published_ETA as string,
		Published_ETD as string,
		Start_Work as string,
		End_Work as string,
		Begin_Receive_Date as string,
		Cargo_Cutoff_Date as string,
		Hazard_Cutoff_Date as string,
		Reefer_Cutoff_Date as string,
		Labor_On_Board_Date as string,
		Labor_Off_Board_Date as string,
		Off_Port_Arrival_Date as string,
		Off_Port_Departure as string,
		Pilot_On_Board_Date as string,
		Pilot_Off_Board_Date as string,
		Est_BBK_Discharge as string,
		Est_BBK_Load as string,
		Est_Load as string,
		Est_Discharge as string,
		Est_Restow as string,
		Est_Shift as string,
		Vessel_Classification as string,
		Vessel_Class_Length_Overall_cm as integer,
		Vessel_Class_Beam_cm as short,
		Vessel_TEU_Capacity as short,
		Lloyds_Code as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: true,
	format: 'delta',
	fileSystem: 'mct',
	folderPath: 'silver/vesselvisits') ~> vesselvisits
moves filter(equals(Carry_CHE_Kind,'SC') && equals(isNull(Carry_CHE_Id),false()) && equals(isNull(t_carry_complete),false()) && equals(isNull(Move_Kind),false())) ~> filter1
select3 alterRow(upsertIf(true())) ~> AlterRow1
filter1 aggregate(groupBy(mve_gkey),
	each(match(name!='mve_gkey'), $$ = first($$))) ~> aggregate1
aggregate1 select(mapColumn(
		mve_gkey,
		Unit_Nbr,
		Facility_Id,
		Complex_Id,
		Yard_Id,
		Carrier_Visit_Key,
		Event_Type_Id,
		Move_Kind,
		From_Location,
		To_Location,
		From_Position_Name,
		To_Position_Name,
		Fetch_CHE_Id,
		Fetch_CHE_Kind,
		Carry_CHE_Id,
		Carry_CHE_Kind,
		Put_CHE_Id,
		Put_CHE_Kind,
		t_carry_complete,
		t_put,
		t_fetch,
		Twin_Carry,
		Twin_Put,
		Twin_Carry = Twin_Fetch,
		dist_carry,
		dist_start,
		Category_Id,
		Freight_Kind_Id,
		pow,
		Year,
		Month,
		Week
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> select1
vesselvisits select(mapColumn(
		Carrier_Visit_Key,
		Carrier_Visit_Id,
		Vessel_Id,
		Complex_Id,
		Facility_Id,
		Phase,
		Carrier_Mode,
		Operator_Line_Id,
		Operator_Line_Role,
		Operator_Line_Name,
		Service_Id,
		Service_Name,
		Carrier_Name,
		Vessel_Class,
		Start_Work,
		End_Work,
		Vessel_Classification,
		Vessel_Class_Length_Overall_cm,
		Vessel_Class_Beam_cm,
		Lloyds_Code
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> select2
select1, select2 join(select1@Carrier_Visit_Key == select2@Carrier_Visit_Key,
	joinType:'left',
	matchType:'exact',
	ignoreSpaces: false,
	broadcast: 'auto')~> join1
join1 select(mapColumn(
		mve_gkey,
		Unit_Nbr,
		Facility_Id = select1@Facility_Id,
		Complex_Id = select1@Complex_Id,
		Yard_Id,
		Moves_Carrier_Visit_Key = select1@Carrier_Visit_Key,
		Event_Type_Id,
		Move_Kind,
		From_Location,
		To_Location,
		From_Position_Name,
		To_Position_Name,
		Fetch_CHE_Id,
		Fetch_CHE_Kind,
		Carry_CHE_Id,
		Carry_CHE_Kind,
		Put_CHE_Id,
		Put_CHE_Kind,
		t_carry_complete,
		t_put,
		t_fetch,
		Twin_Carry,
		Twin_Put,
		dist_carry,
		dist_start,
		Category_Id,
		Freight_Kind_Id,
		pow,
		Year,
		Month,
		Week,
		Vessel_Carrier_Visit_Key = select2@Carrier_Visit_Key,
		Carrier_Visit_Id,
		Vessel_Id,
		Phase,
		Carrier_Mode,
		Operator_Line_Id,
		Operator_Line_Role,
		Operator_Line_Name,
		Service_Id,
		Service_Name,
		Carrier_Name,
		Vessel_Class,
		Start_Work,
		End_Work,
		Vessel_Classification,
		Vessel_Class_Length_Overall_cm,
		Vessel_Class_Beam_cm,
		Lloyds_Code
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> select3
AlterRow1 sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'delta',
	fileSystem: 'mct',
	folderPath: 'gold/moves_vessel_detail',
	mergeSchema: true,
	autoCompact: true,
	optimizedWrite: true,
	vacuum: 0,
	deletable: false,
	insertable: false,
	updateable: false,
	upsertable: true,
	keys:['mve_gkey'],
	umask: 0777,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	partitionBy('key',
		0,
		Year,
		Month,
		Week
	)) ~> sink1
